title: Unity is Strength

pages.text: A pandemonium of parrots always flew together in search of food.
They landed on fields together and pecked at the crops.
One day, a farmer noticed this and set a net trap to catch the crop-damaging birds.
As usual, the parrots landed on the field to peck the crops.
Alas! All of them got caught in the trap.
They started emitting loud, sharp squawks and flattening their feathers out of panic.
The leader of the flock said calmly, "Listen carefully, everyone. Don't make any noise. If we all try to fly together, we can escape. Do you all agree?"
They all agreed immediately. The leader said, "I shall count to three. After three, we must all fly up together at once."
Just as the leader said, they all did it, and they successfully escaped from the trap.
They were very happy, and that day, they realized that unity is strength.

moral: When we work together and help one another, we can overcome even the biggest challenges. Unity is strength.
